title: T-048 — UI parity: allergen changeover screen and full gate modal
prompt:
# T-048 — UI parity: allergen changeover screen and full gate modal

PRD/UX refs: SCR-08-03, MODAL-08-11, prototype labels changeover_screen,changeover_gate_modal

Goal: Replace changeover stub with full cleaning checklist, ATP capture, risk badges and dual sign-off UI.

Implementation details:
Use Next.js App Router Server Components by default, shadcn/ui components, next-intl keys, org-scoped data access, loading/empty/error states, and literal data-prototype-label markers matching _meta/prototype-labels/prototype-index-production.json. Closeout must include desktop screenshots and Playwright traces. Match prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/production/other-screens.jsx:294-390 and expand modals.jsx:344-364 to PRD/UX requirements: risk-level banner, cleaning steps with photo evidence, ATP grid for high risk, shift lead + quality lead PIN sign-off, segregated hard-block state.

Scope files:
- apps/web/app/production/changeover/[event_id]/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/components/production/changeover-gate-modal.tsx [create]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/production/other-screens.jsx:294-390
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/production/modals.jsx:344-364

Acceptance criteria:
1. Changeover screen shows medium/high/segregated states and required evidence
2. Dual sign-off UI remains disabled until cleaning/ATP requirements pass
3. Closeout includes screenshots for incomplete, ATP fail, and completed gate plus trace

Evidence: include screenshots/artifacts and Playwright traces/artifacts for UI/E2E tasks; include API test output for backend tasks.
